critical_issues.title: No rollback path if post-swap smoke test fails
critical_issues.recommendation: Add rollback swap and post-rollback production smoke validation when post-swap validation fails.

suggestions.title: Guard against unsupported promotion directions
suggestions.recommendation: Enforce source=staging and target=prod and align inputs/descriptions with the supported promotion path.

suggestions.title: Make smoke test function configurable
suggestions.recommendation: Use configurable SMOKE_TEST_FUNCTION_NAME with default fallback instead of hardcoded function endpoint.

suggestions.title: Add retry/backoff and timeout to smoke tests
suggestions.recommendation: Use bounded retries and explicit curl connect/max timeouts for pre-swap, post-swap, and rollback smoke checks with transport-error handling.

suggestions.title: Add concurrency control
suggestions.recommendation: Serialize promotion runs by adding workflow concurrency group with cancel-in-progress disabled.

suggestions.title: Validate target slot running state before swap
suggestions.recommendation: Check both source and target slot state are Running before executing slot swap.

suggestions.title: Pin third-party actions to immutable SHAs
suggestions.recommendation: Pin actions/checkout and azure/login to full commit SHAs for supply-chain hardening.

suggestions.title: Gate rollback to swap-executed failure paths
suggestions.recommendation: Run rollback only when swap step completed successfully and a later step failed.
